name: healthcare_clinical_trial_amendment_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare clinical trial amendment millhaven lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Nadia Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Nadia Ishikawa, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Fatima Dubois
agents.identity: I am Fatima Dubois, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Nadia Ishikawa must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Nadia Ishikawa do?
